title: Sexing bovine preimplantation embryos by PCR
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2snqv","text":"This protocol for using PCR to sex bovine embryos are based on Y-specific and autosomal targets described by Park et al, Theriogenology 2001; 55: 1843-1853 but with updates according to current bovine genomic database in NCBI as of 2019.Note that assembly of the bovine Y chromosome is still in progress.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6kbgg","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c80kh","text":"","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Peter J Hansen
